description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian with a medium build, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched. He has a large, voluminous, curly hairstyle and is dressed in a casual short-sleeve t-shirt with a visible logo or text on the front and back. He wears fitted pants and low-top sneakers, giving him a relaxed, urban appearance suitable for city environments. The figure's skin tone is medium, and his facial features are neutral, with no visible accessories or carried items. The clothing fits closely to the body, and the shoes have a simple, athletic design. The overall look is modern and casual, ideal for everyday street or park settings.
description: A casually dressed adult male with a large curly hairstyle, t-shirt, fitted pants, and sneakers, standing upright. The figure has a relaxed, urban appearance with no visible accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face, chest logo, and full details of the t-shirt, pants, and sneakers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the arm's relaxed position, and the side seam of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the t-shirt's back text, and the back of the pants and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and the relaxed arm and leg posture.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve t-shirt and fitted pants
